channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: AI's impact on jobs: not all doom and gloom - Axios
item.description:
1. AI's impact on jobs: not all doom and gloom  Axios
  2. Report: Losing your job to AI doesn’t just lead to unemployment, it leaves lasting scars  CNN
  3. AI will affect more than half of all U.S. jobs, analysis finds  CBS News
  4. The one piece of data that could actually shed light on your job and AI  MIT Technology Review
  5. Anthropic's research shows that AI can already do a huge portion of many jobs; its top economist talks about how that could shape the future of work  Fortune

item.title: What happens at 8 p.m.? Even Trump’s allies aren’t sure. - Politico
item.description:
1. What happens at 8 p.m.? Even Trump’s allies aren’t sure.  Politico
  2. US denies nuclear plan as deadline on threat to Iran ‘civilisation’ looms  Al Jazeera
  3. Did Trump Just Threaten to Use Nuclear Weapons in Iran?  The Atlantic
  4. We Asked the White House If Trump Was Considering Nuking Iran. Its Response Was Chilling.  Mother Jones
  5. White House Keeps World Guessing Ahead of Trump’s Deadline  wsj.com

item.title: Jet fuel supply concerns grow as war with Iran drags on, airlines cut flights - CNBC
item.description:
1. Jet fuel supply concerns grow as war with Iran drags on, airlines cut flights  CNBC
  2. Your flight is about to get more expensive. These tips could save you this summer.  Yahoo Finance
  3. Despite soaring jet fuel prices, air fares aren’t up that much. But they will be  CNN
  4. Ryanair CEO says book summer trips before fares soar, despite risk of fuel crunch canceling flights  Fortune
  5. Asian airlines trim schedules and carry extra fuel as supplies tighten  Reuters

item.title: Iran talks show glimmer of progress as Trump deadline looms - Axios
item.description:
1. Iran talks show glimmer of progress as Trump deadline looms  Axios
  2. US-Iran diplomacy still active as Trump deadline looms  Al-Monitor
  3. Trump claims ‘active’ peace talks with Iran as bombing deadline approaches  The Washington Post
  4. Trump declines to rule out ground troops if Iran doesn’t make a deal  The Hill
  5. Trump’s ‘new, reasonable’ Iran is neither new nor reasonable, and he knows it  timesofisrael.com
